__comment: PerplexityXPC MCP Servers configuration. Copied to %LOCALAPPDATA%\PerplexityXPC\mcp-servers.json on install.
__doc: Each key under 'mcpServers' is a unique server ID. Set 'disabled': true to temporarily exclude a server.

filesystem-example.description: Grants Perplexity read/write access to a local directory tree via the MCP Filesystem server.

brave-search-example.description: Enables web search via the Brave Search API. Requires a BRAVE_API_KEY environment variable.

sqlite-example.description: Read-only access to a SQLite database via MCP.

memory-example.description: Persistent key-value memory store for the AI across sessions.

github-example.description: GitHub repository access — read files, issues, PRs. Requires GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN.
